questions.question: A bacteria colony starts with 500 cells and doubles every 3 hours. How many cells will be present after 12 hours?
questions.explanation: The bacteria doubles 4 times in 12 hours (12 ÷ 3 = 4). Use N = 500 × 2^4 = 500 × 16 = 8000.

questions.question: A radioactive substance decays according to the formula N(t) = 1000(0.5)^(t/5), where t is time in days. What is N(10)?
You invest $2000 in an account earning 5% annual compound interest. If no withdrawals are made, what is the balance after 2 years?
The population of a town decreases by 8% each year. If the current population is 50,000, write an expression for the population after n years.
questions.explanation: A decrease of 8% means 92% remains, so multiply by 0.92 each year. After n years: P(n) = 50000(0.92)^n.

questions.question: A car worth $30,000 depreciates to 85% of its value each year. After how many years will it be worth approximately $15,530?
A viral video gets 200 initial views. It doubles every 2 days. On which day will it reach 6400 views?
questions.explanation: Use 200 × 2^(d/2) = 6400, so 2^(d/2) = 32 = 2^5. Then d/2 = 5, so d = 10. Wait—check: after 8 days, 200 × 2^4 = 3200; after 10 days, 200 × 2^5 = 6400. Answer is day 10.
